dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4112 IS: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to extend the credit period for the production of refined coal, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Justice introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to extend the credit period for the production of refined coal, and for other purposes.

section.header: Extension of credit period for refined coal production

subsection.text: Section 45(e)(8)(A) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: in clause (i), by striking during the 10-year period beginning on the date the facility was originally placed in service and inserting before January 1, 2033, and
in clause (ii), by amending subclause (II) to read as follows:

subclause.text: before January 1, 2033, and during such taxable year.

paragraph.text: Section 45(e)(8)(D) of such Code is amended—
Section 45(d)(8)(A) of such Code is amended by inserting which allows such facility to produce steel industry fuel after any modification to a facility.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to refined coal produced and sold after December 31, 2025.
